verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah

“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Mi khat in a tuam vilvelin kiciamna a bawl ciangin, tua a kiciam mite pen nangmah in Topa-a'-in na seh ding a, a nuai-a kiseh bangin kitanh-in suaktakik thei ding hi
Pasal kum sawmnih panin kum sawmguk a phate a man na sehna pen, biakinn shekel zangin pasal khat ciangin ngun shekel sawmnga hi ding hi
Numei ahih leh shekel sawmthum hi ding hi
Kum nga pan kum sawmnih ciang a phate, pasal ahih leh shekel sawmnih hi ding a, numei ahih leh shekel sawm hi ding hi
Kha khat pan kum nga ciang a phate pen pasal ahih leh ngun shekel nga hi ding a, numei ahih leh ngun shekel thum hi ding hi
Kum sawmguk pan a tungsiahte pen pasal ahih leh shekel sawmlenga hi ding a, numei ahih leh shekel sawm hi ding hi

“Mi khatpeuh zawnglua-in nangma sehzah a piakzawh kei leh, siampipa kiangah a mi hong kipaipih ding a, siampipa in ama man seh ding hi. A kiciam mipa a siamna tawh kizui-in siampipa in ama man seh ding hi
“Mite in Topa' tungah biakna-in a piakte pen ganhing ahih leh, mi khatpeuh in Topa' tungah a piak tua bang ganhingte khempeuh a siangtho ahi hi

Amah in na khat peuhpeuh, a hoihte a hoihlo tawh ahi zongin, a hoihlote a hoih tawh ahi zongin, laihlo, kheklo ding hi. Amah in ganhing khat ganhing adang khat tawh a khek leh, tua ganhing leh a khekna ganhing a siangtho hi khawm ding hi
Tua pen Topa' tungah a kipia theilo ganhing nin khat ahih leh, mipa in siampipa mai-ah a ganhing paipih ding a
siampipa in hoih hi, ci-in ahi zongin sia hi, ci-in ahi zongin a man zah seh ding hi
Ahih hangin amah in tua ganhing a tatkik nop leh, a kisehna banah nga-ah khat behlap ding hi
“Mi khatpeuh in a siangtho dingin Topa' tungah a inn a ap ciangin, siampipa in a hoihna leh a hoihlohna tawh kizui-in a man seh ding a, siampipa' sehna bangin kip ding hi
A appa in ama inn a tatkik nop leh, a kisehna banah nga-ah khat sum tawh behlap ding a, tua inn ama-a' hi kik ding hi

“Mi khat in a luah ama leitang phelkhat Topa' tungah a ap leh, nangma sehna pen khaici vawh zah ding tawh kizui ding hi. Mangbuhham beem khat dim a pawina leitang pen ngun shekel sawmnga-in kiseh ding hi
Amah in jubilee kum-a kipanin a lo a ap leh, nangma sehna zahzah bit ding hi
Ahih hangin jubilee kum khit ciangin amah in a lo a ap leh, siampipa in jubilee kumkik dong a omlai kumte tawh kizui-in a manzah sum seh ding a, nangma sehna zah panin kikhiam ding hi
Lo a appa in a tatkik nop leh, a kisehna banah nga-ah khat sum tawh behlap ding a, tua lo ama-a' hisuak ding hi
Ahih hangin amah in a lo a tanh nuamlo ahi a, amah in midang khat tungah a zuak ahi zongin ahih leh, tua pen amah in tanhkik thei nawnlo ding hi
A lo pen, jubilee huna piak khiat ciangin, a ki-apsa lo mah bangin Topa' tungah a siangtho hi ding a, siampipa in tua lo tang ding hi
“Amah in luahna tawh a neih a hilo, a leisa lo pen Topa' tungah a ap leh
siampipa in jubilee kum ciangdong ding tua man seh ding a, tua ni-in a mipa in a kiseh zah, Topa' tungah a siangtho-in pia ding hi
Jubilee kum ciangin a lo pen a kileinapa, gamhluahna tawh tua leitang a nei mipa tungah tungkik ding hi
“A kisehna peuhmah biakinn shekel kizang ding hi; gerah sawmnih ciangin shekel khat hi ding hi
“Ahih hangin tacil pen Topa-a' hi khinzo ahih mah bangin, kuamah in ganhing tacilte ap theilo ding hi; bawng hita leh tuu hita leh Topa-a' ahi hi
Ganhing nin ahih leh, nangma sehna bangin amah in lei kikin, tua banah seh nga-ah khat behlap ding hi. Tua hilo a, a kitat kei leh, a kisehna bangin kizuak ding hi

“Ahih hangin mi khat in a neih, Topa' tungah a ap, a ki-apsa nate, mi hita leh ganhing hita leh, a luah ama lo hita leh, kizuaklo ding, kitanhlo ding hi. A ki-ap na peuhmah Topa' tungah a siangthopen ahi hi
Mite lak nangawn panin a kisusiamang dingin a ki-apsa mi peuhmah, kitanhlo ding a, kithat ding hi
“Leitang panin a piang khempeuh khaici hita leh singgah hita leh sawmah khat Topa-a' hi a, Topa-a' dingin siangtho hi
Mi khatpeuh in sawmah khat a piak na khat peuhpeuh a tat nop leh, amah in tua banah nga-ah khat behlap ding hi
Bawnghon leh tuulekeel hon sawmah khat khempeuh leh a cingpa' ciangkhut nuai-a a pai ganhing khempeuh sawmah khat peuhmah Topa-a' dingin a siangtho hi ding hi
Mi khat in pha hiam sia hiam ci-in kantello ding a, kheklo ding hi. A khek leh, tua leh a khekna pen a siangtho hi khawm ding hi. Tua pen kitanhlo ding hi,” a ci hi
Hihte pen Sinai Mual tungah Topa in Israel mite-a' dingin Moses tungah a piak thute ahi hi.
